title: polygala kurdica subsp. bornmuelleri
intro: Polygala kurdica subsp. bornmuelleri is a lesser-known species of the Polygala genus, a type of flowering plant in the milkwort family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Turkey and the Middle East, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polygala kurdica subsp. bornmuelleri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system, as well as its use in treating coughs, colds, and other respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Polygala kurdica subsp. bornmuelleri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
